title: Level 4: The Box Model
description: CSS ka sabse zaroori concept: Margin, Padding, aur Border.
guide:
Level 4: The Box Model

HTML me har cheez ek dabba (box) hoti hai. Is dabbe ke 3 parts hote hain:

  • Padding: Dabbe ke andar ki jagah.
  • Border: Dabbe ki boundary (kinala).
  • Margin: Dabbe ke bahar ki jagah (dusre dabbo se doori).
